/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--version-script="/home/hong/workspace/wos_gino/MCGINO/bindings/zombie_Laplace/deps/tbb/src/tbbmalloc_proxy/def/lin64-proxy.def" -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now,-z,noexecstack -shared -Wl,-soname,libtbbmalloc_proxy.so.2 -o ../../../../gnu_11.4_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc_proxy.so.2.16 CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc_proxy.dir/function_replacement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc_proxy.dir/proxy.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hong/workspace/wos_gino/MCGINO/bindings/zombie_Laplace/build/gnu_11.4_cxx11_64_release ../../../../gnu_11.4_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc.so.2.16 -ldl
